title: Re-summarise a completed LC run and emit user-facing CSV exports
summary: Recompute the fit summary from a completed run and write the user-facing artifacts: summary.json with class-level coefficients, segment sizes, log-likelihood, and information criteria; plus a CSV exports directory containing IC.csv, coefficients.csv, and related per-segment outputs. Idempotent — safe to re-run.
description: Reads the persisted state from a completed LC `fit` run and writes the user-facing artifacts: a `summary.json` containing per-class coefficients, segment sizes, log-likelihood, and information criteria, plus a CSV exports directory with `IC.csv`, `coefficients.csv`, and related per-segment outputs. Does not refit anything — purely a post-processing step that re-derives the summary from the saved checkpoint. Safe to re-run any number of times.
usage:
[["model-lc::finalize"]]
run_dir = "<existing run dir>"
run_name = "lc_run"
# optional:
export_dir = "<dir>"

arguments.name: run_dir
arguments.description: Directory of a completed LC fit run. Must contain `spec.json` and `checkpoint.postcard` — the persisted state written by `fit`.

arguments.name: run_name
arguments.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

arguments.name: export_dir
arguments.description: Where to write the CSV exports. Defaults to `{run_dir}/exports`. Override only if you want to keep multiple finalisations side-by-side.

details:
`finalize` is the post-processing step that turns a raw LC fit checkpoint into a stakeholder-ready summary. It reads `checkpoint.postcard` and computes:

- Per-class coefficient tables (one row per attribute, one column per class).
- Segment sizes (mean posterior membership probability per class).
- In-sample log-likelihood and information criteria (BIC, AIC, AIC3, CAIC).
- Per-segment fit statistics.

The persisted state itself is left untouched. `fit` calls `finalize` automatically at the end of a successful run with the default `export_dir`, so you don't normally need to invoke this command explicitly. Use it directly when you want to write exports to a different directory or regenerate them after manual edits to the spec.

Unlike the HB `finalize`, there is no burnin parameter — LC is a point-estimate method, not a posterior sampler, so the checkpoint already contains a single fit state.
value:
On success, `export_dir` (defaulting to `{run_dir}/exports`) contains:

- `summary.json` — class coefficients, segment sizes, log-likelihood, information criteria.
- `IC.csv` — per-segment information criteria in tabular form.
- `coefficients.csv` — per-class coefficient table for direct ingestion by `choice-wrangling::expand-coefficients`.
- Related per-segment outputs.

In protocol mode the plugin emits `event.run.started`, then `event.run.finished` (or `event.run.failed`).
notes: `finalize` does not refit — it only re-summarises the persisted checkpoint.
Use `export_dir` to keep multiple finalisations side-by-side (e.g., one per spec variant).
The `coefficients.csv` output is the file you pass to `choice-wrangling::expand-coefficients` to translate the per-class coefficients back into attribute / level form.

see_also.description: Initial LC fit — calls `finalize` automatically at the end.
Cross-validation counterpart — finalises every fold of a `cv-fit` run.
Translate per-class coefficients back into attribute / level form for reporting.

examples.title: Write exports to a side-by-side directory
Re-finalise after moving the run directory

fields.name: run_dir
fields.description: Directory of a completed fit run (must contain spec.json + checkpoint.postcard).

fields.name: run_name
fields.description: Short identifier for this run. Non-empty string. Used to name output artifacts and subdirectories so multiple runs under the same run_dir do not collide. Must not contain path separators or '..'.

fields.name: export_dir
fields.description: Where to write the CSV exports. Defaults to {run_dir}/exports.

artifacts.title: Per-class coefficient table
artifacts.description: Re-exported coefficient table for the completed LC run. One row per attribute level per class. Feed into choice-wrangling::expand-coefficients for simulation.

artifacts.title: Fit summary
artifacts.description: Class sizes, log-likelihood, AIC, BIC, and coefficient table in JSON form.
